codeReview.summary: Commit b2b4fc4 adds explicit unknown-name guards for `skill`, `rule`, and `subagent` before execution, producing clear error text and consistent exit code 1; added integration-mock tests cover all three commands and cross-command exit-code parity, satisfying VAL-CORE-005 and preserving related singular-command contract behavior.

issues.description: The available-item lists in unknown-name error messages are emitted from unsorted filesystem/object-key results (`listSkillDirsAsync`, `listRuleFiles`, `listSubagentFiles`), so exact message ordering may vary by environment; sort before join if strict deterministic text output is required.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker skill procedure requires `bun run test:integration:real`, but this mission state did not provide that script for the worker when this feature was implemented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges explicitly notes missing `test:integration:real`; package.json scripts include `test:unit` and `test:integration:mock` but no `test:integration:real`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared service command catalog is out of sync with package scripts for integration-real testing.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml defines `test_integration_real: bun run test:integration:real`, while package.json has no `test:integration:real` script.

summary: Reviewed feature cli-core-singular-unknown-name-errors via features metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit b2b4fc4 diff. Implementation meets VAL-CORE-005 with deterministic failure path and consistent non-zero exits for unknown singular names; only a non-blocking determinism nuance remains around unsorted available-item list ordering.
